name: K Football Stadium Pattaya
addressFull: 215/2 Moo 9, Nong Prue, Bang Lamung, Chon Buri 20150
hours: Open 24 hours daily according to current Google Maps and ThaiThurkic listings.

pitches.pitchDimensions: Two covered artificial pitches. A 2025 local guide describes one five-a-side pitch and one three-quarter-size pitch usable for eleven-a-side; another current directory describes seven- and eight-a-side layouts. Confirm the preferred markings and goal setup when booking.

booking.hourlyRate: THB 1,200-1,800 per hour depending on pitch size, time, weekend and holiday
booking.method: Phone or operator Facebook; hourly public hire is explicitly documented.

pickupGames.contactChannel: Phone or operator Facebook for enquiries; no current joinable-session post or public group invite was located.

leagues.details: K7 league rules and venue contacts are documented for 2019. Current reviews indicate team play, but a current league schedule was not found.

football.englishEvidence: Recent English reviews describe team play and received short English owner replies, and the venue attracts international players. No current English booking exchange or joinable-session instruction was found.

praise: A Thai review from about one year before verification praises the clean, attractive field and the availability of drinking water, toilets, waiting seats and parking.
A December 2025 English review says many teams can play there, while another review praises the ground length and width and mentions international players.
complaints: A detailed English review criticises the older lighting and heat under the tin roof. Older Thai reviews also disagree about parking capacity, so peak-event parking should be confirmed.

sources.label: Google Maps identity, coordinates, current hours and newest reviews
Pattaya Unlimited 2025 pitch configuration and numeric hourly range
ThaiThurkic current phone, hours and seven/eight-a-side description
Wanderlog location-specific review compilation only; its Planet Football summary was rejected
CopaFacil K7 league rules and venue contacts

confidenceReason: Floodlighting and a dated numeric hourly rate are established, but current organised pickup play, schedule and joining method are not. The pickup-game star is missing.
unverified: authoritative current pitch formats and markings
